title: ophrys tenthredinifera subsp. neglecta
side_effects: Ophrys tenthredinifera subsp. neglecta can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Ingesting the plant's leaves or roots can cause nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds may lead to kidney damage and liver failure in severe cases. Improper handling and preparation of the plant can also result in anaphylactic shock and respiratory distress.
